headline.purpose: Page headings and major section titles. One per view.

body.purpose: All prose content and descriptions. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Nav items, chips, button text, form labels.

micro.purpose: Mobile nav labels, role badges. Floor at 10px.

shadows.name: auth-card
shadows.purpose: Used only on the AuthCard (login/register). Grounds the card against the full-bleed auth background. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, nav item hover, badge color changes.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile bottom nav → desktop top nav switch. Primary responsive breakpoint.

components.name: Button Primary
components.description: Primary action button. Used for submit, approve, confirm.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; background-color: #3b82f6; color: #ffffff; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #2563eb; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Button Ghost
components.description: Secondary action, placed next to a primary. Low visual weight.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; background-color: transparent; color: #8a90a0; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #e8eaf0; background-color: #1e2330; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Button Danger
components.description: Destructive action: reject, revoke, delete. Requires confirmation context.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; background-color: #ef4444; color: #ffffff; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ef4444; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input with label above and optional error message below.
components.html: El email es requerido.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #8a90a0; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #2a3040; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 14px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; background-color: #1e2330; color: #e8eaf0; transition: border-color 150ms ease, outline 150ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #555e72; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 0; } .ds-input-error { font-size: 12px; color: #ef4444; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; }

components.name: Nav Item (Desktop)
components.description: Top navigation link. Two states: active (current section) and inactive.
components.html: PanelUsuariosProductos
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 14px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; color: #8a90a0; transition: color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #e8eaf0; background-color: #1e2330; } .ds-nav-link--active { background-color: #1e2330; color: #e8eaf0; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status indicator for user approval state.
components.html: PendienteAprobadoRechazado
components.css: .ds-badges { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-badge--pending { background-color: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.15); color: #f59e0b; } .ds-badge--approved { background-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15); color: #22c55e; } .ds-badge--rejected { background-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15); color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: List item card for admin user rows and student content items.
components.html:
Nombre del contenido

Básico · Video · Drive ID: 1abc...
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #2a3040; background-color: #161a22; padding: 16px; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #3b82f6; } .ds-card-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #e8eaf0; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #8a90a0; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; }

components.name: Auth Card
components.description: Login and registration container. The only component with a shadow. External-facing.
components.html:
W
Academia WARA GPS

Iniciar sesión

Ingresá con tu cuenta registrada.
components.css: .ds-auth-card { border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #2a3040; background-color: #161a22; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-auth-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-logo { height: 32px; width: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background-color: #3b82f6; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-auth-brand { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #8a90a0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-auth-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #e8eaf0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-auth-subtitle { font-size: 14px; color: #8a90a0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Academia WARA GPS is built like field documentation for professionals: every element earns its place by making information faster to reach or easier to read. The interface is not a product to admire — it is equipment to use. A GPS technician lands, finds the video they need, consumes it, and leaves. The system's role is to eliminate friction on that path.

The visual language borrows from the precision tools the user already trusts: developer tools, operations dashboards, technical documentation (Linear, Vercel). Deep near-black surfaces, a restrained Signal Blue for active states only, tonal layering over shadows, and a single system font at tight scale. Motion is minimal — state changes only, under 200ms.

This system explicitly rejects the LMS aesthetic: progress bars, gamification, saturated color blocks, icon-heavy card grids. The model is the manual you reach for in the field: structured, precise, fast.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal depth over shadows: three surface levels communicate hierarchy without elevation
Signal Blue as operational indicator only — never decoration
One sans family: system-ui across all roles, weight and size do the work
Four theme variants sharing a single token vocabulary
Admin as tool, student as reader: density for the operator, clarity for the learner

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is used for one thing: 'this is active, selected, or the next action.' Never decoration, hover tints, or heading accents.

rules.name: The Theme Contract
rules.body: All four themes share identical CSS token names. New design decisions are made at the token level only. A component that hardcodes a hex value is a design bug.

rules.name: The One Weight Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through size and weight contrast (400 body / 500 label / 700 heading). Never through letter-spacing, uppercase, or color alone.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements are flat at rest. Shadows exist only on the AuthCard. Any new shadow addition requires explicit justification.

dos: Do use Signal Blue only for active states, primary actions, and focus rings
Do express depth through background color steps (base → panel → elevated), not shadows
Do reference colors via var(--token-name) everywhere — never hardcode hex
Do keep motion under 200ms, limited to transition-colors or transition-opacity
Do include all interactive states: default, hover, focus-visible, disabled, loading
Do use skeleton loaders (animate-pulse) for async content, not inline spinners
donts: Don't use Signal Blue as decoration, hover tint, or heading accent
Don't add shadows to any component other than the AuthCard
Don't introduce a second font family — system-ui is the deliberate choice
Don't build LMS patterns: progress bars, badges, gamification, completion rings
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — emphasis through weight and size only
Don't use border-left as a colored accent stripe greater than 1px
Don't hardcode hex values from one theme — all four themes must work
Don't add section eyebrows (small uppercase tracked kickers above every heading)
Don't replicate Udemy, Coursera, or heavy enterprise LMS aesthetics
